title: evolvulus chrysotrichos
intro: Evolvulus chrysotrichos, also known as Dwarf Blue Daze or Blue Spurred Porterweed, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Evolvulus chrysotrichos include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Evolvulus chrysotrichos can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
